name: Pixverse v6
description: Pixverse v6 is the latest Pixverse video model with support for up to 15-second videos, customizable duration from 1 to 15 seconds, and audio generation.

input.prompt: A golden retriever running through a field of sunflowers on a sunny day

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

examples.name: Long Duration Video
examples.description: Extended 15-second video with audio (v6 supports 1-15 seconds)

input.prompt: A time-lapse of a bustling city street from dawn to dusk, showing the flow of people and vehicles

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

input.prompt: A dramatic aerial shot flying over misty mountain peaks at sunrise, cinematic lighting with volumetric fog

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

input.prompt: Abstract ink drops spreading through water, vivid colors mixing in slow motion

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl
code_snippets.code:
curl https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID/ai/run \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" \
  --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
  --data '{
  "model": "pixverse/v6",
  "input": {
    "prompt": "Abstract ink drops spreading through water, vivid colors mixing in slow motion",
    "aspect_ratio": "1:1",
    "duration": 3,
    "generate_audio": false,
    "negative_prompt": "blurry, low quality",
    "quality": "540p"
  }
}'

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video to generate

image_input.description: Base64-encoded reference image for image-to-video generation (data:image/...;base64,...). The image will be uploaded to Pixverse automatically.

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate audio with the video
